positive: A mystical nocturnal forest scene viewed through a stylized pop-art lens. The main subject is a cluster of bioluminescent flora and fauna, including large, intricately detailed fantastical moths and glowing, stylized mushrooms. The color palette is dominated by deep midnight blues, vibrant neon magentas, electric turquoise, and contrasting gold highlights. The composition features strong vertical elements and a central axis, perfect for a t-shirt print. The style should be highly detailed, graphic novel inspired, with clean silhouettes and bold, high-contrast linework, giving it a sense of cosmic mystery. Dramatic backlighting illuminates the glowing elements against the dark forest void. Clean linework, high saturation, vector illustration quality, seamless pattern potential.
negative: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, grunge, photorealism, grainy, faded, copyrighted characters, celebrity likenesses
